settings.settingsDesc: Configure global settings and API keys
settings.tmdbConfigLoadFailed: Failed to load TMDB config, please check if TMDB-Import path is correct
settings.videoThumbnailSaveFailed: Failed to save video thumbnail settings
settings.fillAllPasswordFields: Please fill in all password fields
settings.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation password do not match
settings.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters

generalSettingsDesc: Configure general options and behavior settings for the application
appearanceSettingsDesc: Customize the look and display effects of the application

appearancePanel.compactModeDesc: Reduce spacing and show more content
appearancePanel.enableBlurDesc: Use blur background in item detail page

helpPanel.title: Help & Support
helpPanel.helpDesc: Get help documentation and app information
helpPanel.viewSourceAndIssue: View source code and submit Issues
helpPanel.viewVersionHistory: View version history and update content
helpPanel.feature1: Smart import and status tracking of media entries
helpPanel.feature2: View upcoming and recently airing media info
helpPanel.feature3: Poster background cropping and video thumbnail extraction
helpPanel.feature5: Hard subtitle extraction and audio transcription
helpPanel.feature7: Support Web, Electron and Docker deployment

modelServicePanel.title: Model Service
modelServicePanel.description: Manage AI model providers, model configurations and usage scenarios
modelServicePanel.siliconFlowDesc: Provides vision and chat model services
modelServicePanel.modelScopeDesc: Provides chat and text generation models
modelServicePanel.inputZhipuKey: Free model pre-configured, but need to enter ZhipuAI API key
modelServicePanel.jumpToSiliconFlow: Go to Silicon Flow API key page
modelServicePanel.jumpToModelScope: Go to ModelScope API key page
modelServicePanel.jumpToZhipu: Go to ZhipuAI API key page
modelServicePanel.scenarioConfigDesc: Select AI model for each function and configure parameters
modelServicePanel.providerConfigDesc: Configure model provider compatible with OpenAI API
modelServicePanel.addModelFromProvider: Add new AI model from provider
modelServicePanel.confirmDeleteProvider: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
modelServicePanel.scenarioThumbnailFilterDesc: AI smart filtering for Video Thumbnail Extraction page, automatically identifies high-quality frames with people and no subtitles
modelServicePanel.scenarioImageAnalysisDesc: Image analysis for Media Recognition page, recognizes posters, stills and analyzes content
modelServicePanel.scenarioSpeechToTextDesc: Audio transcription for AI Episode Summary page, converts video speech to text for summary generation
modelServicePanel.scenarioEpisodeGenerationDesc: For AI Episode Summary page, generates episode summaries based on video content or subtitles
modelServicePanel.scenarioAiChatDesc: For AI Chat Episode Summary page, provides intelligent conversation, Q&A and content creation services
modelServicePanel.scenarioSubtitleOcrDesc: For Hard Subtitle Extraction page, uses multi-modal vision model to recognize hard subtitle text in video frames

videoThumbnail.title: Video Thumbnail Extraction Settings
videoThumbnail.extractionDesc: Simple sequential frame extraction, extract thumbnails from specified time at frame intervals
videoThumbnail.startTimeTooltip: Which point in the video to start extracting thumbnails
videoThumbnail.frameIntervalTooltip: Extract every N frames (1=every frame, 30=about once per second @30fps)
videoThumbnail.threadCountTooltip: Number of videos to process simultaneously
videoThumbnail.keepOriginalTooltip: Keep original video resolution, otherwise scale to 640x360
videoThumbnail.aiFilterDesc: Use Silicon Flow AI to identify frames with people but no subtitles
videoThumbnail.configureApiTooltip: Please set Silicon Flow API key in model service page first
videoThumbnail.step1: Program extracts video frames at frame intervals
videoThumbnail.step2: Each frame is analyzed by AI model for people and subtitles
videoThumbnail.step3: Only frames with people and no subtitles will generate thumbnails
videoThumbnail.step4: This automatically filters out high-quality thumbnails

tools.title: Tool Configuration
tools.description: Manage TMDB-Import tool installation, configuration and dependency environment
tools.manualPathDesc: If you need to use custom path or existing installation, you can manually specify the tool path
tools.toolDesc1: Please enter the full path of local TMDB-Import tool
tools.toolDesc2: Make sure the path contains executable Python modules
tools.toolDesc3: After configuration, you can use local integration features in item details
tools.toolDesc4: Supports streaming platform crawling and automatic upload to TMDB
tools.configIniHint: Please configure TMDB-Import tool path in 'Tool Management' tab first, then configure config.ini
tools.saveUserProfileDesc: When enabled, saves browser login status and other user data, can only start one Chrome process. When disabled, does not save user data to support multi-task concurrent processing
tools.forceUploadBackdropDesc: Force upload backdrop even if TMDB already has one
tools.autoVoteAfterUploadDesc: Automatically vote for the backdrop after upload to increase image weight
tools.renameCsvDesc: Rename CSV files to support processing multiple import tasks simultaneously
tools.deleteCsvDesc: Automatically delete CSV files after import to avoid duplicate imports

securityPanel.securityDesc: Modify administrator account password to ensure account security
securityPanel.enterNewPassword: Please enter new password (at least 8 characters)

tmdbImportUpdater.title: TMDB-Import Tool Management
tmdbImportUpdater.description: Automatically manage TMDB-Import tool download, installation and updates
tmdbImportUpdater.installedSuccess: TMDB-Import has been installed to the latest version
tmdbImportUpdater.installedAndConfigured: TMDB-Import has been installed and path configured
tmdbImportUpdater.updateAvailable: New version available, recommended to update
tmdbImportUpdater.currentIsLatest: Current version is already the latest
tmdbImportUpdater.reinstallNote: Reinstallation will use the latest version's default configuration, but will automatically preserve your TMDB username and password.

dependencyInstaller.title: Dependency Installation
dependencyInstaller.description: One-click install third-party libraries and browser environment required by TMDB-Import
dependencyInstaller.allPackagesInstalled: All Python packages are already installed
dependencyInstaller.pleaseInstallPlaywrightFirst: Please install Python and Playwright package first
dependencyInstaller.playwrightNote: Used for browser automation, supports modern web scraping
dependencyInstaller.pythonDateutilNote: Provides powerful datetime parsing and processing functions
dependencyInstaller.pillowNote: Python image processing library, for image manipulation and format conversion
dependencyInstaller.bordercropNote: Specialized image border detection and cropping tool
dependencyInstaller.needInstallPlaywrightFirst: Need to install Playwright Python package first
dependencyInstaller.willDownloadChromium: Will download and install Chromium browser (~100MB)
dependencyInstaller.browserWillInstallToPlaywrightDir: Browser will be installed to Playwright's dedicated directory
dependencyInstaller.canUseBrowserAfterInstall: After installation, you can use TMDB-Import's browser features
dependencyInstaller.pleaseInstallPlaywrightFirst2: Please install the Playwright package above first, then install the browser environment.
